decision: The owner-authorized Wave-2 scope-corrected repin leaves 371 bytes of Bank reserve above the 1536-byte release floor. Against the sealed v1.0.1 baseline of 332 bytes this is a 39-byte aggregate credit, so no aggregate debit is carried; EXT, symbols, Namepool and Directory are also credits or unchanged. The owner explicitly repinned 1907 bytes of Bank reserve, 320 free symbols and 4897 Namepool bytes and authorized the fresh R3/R4/R5/R6 hardware acceptance chain on 2026-07-18.
